title: Lucky Cat
description: Give you a lucky buff for better fishing loot
body:
**This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!**

---
If you have a cat sitting beside you, you will gain a luck buff. which means your fishing loot will be better.
Now is your cat more useful?


The cover is made with resource pack Fresh Animation by FreshLX
